_comment: This plugin depends on the notebooklm-mcp server. Install separately via: uv tool install notebooklm-mcp-cli. Once installed, the `nlm` CLI registers the MCP server automatically. This file documents the dependency; it does not bundle the server.

notebooklm-mcp._note: Provided by notebooklm-mcp-cli package (uv tool install notebooklm-mcp-cli). This block is informational — the server is registered by `nlm` itself when installed.
